skills.name: Iron Skin
skills.description: Temper your skin to become hard as steel and momentarily make your body hard. Decreases Physical Attack received during the buff, immune to Knockback/Knockdown while using Monk skill.
skills.effect_text:
Physical Attack Damage - CaptionRatio %
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Double Punch
skills.description: Use your trained fists to attack an enemy in quick succession.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %x2 per 0.3 seconds
Maximum Duration: 3.5 seconds
Consumes CaptionRatio3 SP per second

skills.name: Palm Strike
skills.description: Use your trained fingertips to attack the enemy by inflicting an internal injury. Ignores part of the enemy's defense.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Ignores enemy Defense by CaptionRatio %

skills.name: Hand Knife
skills.description: Strike with a powerful hand knife to deal damage on an enemy. Hand Knife can be used after Palm Strike. Deals additional damage proportional to the enemy's SPR (additional damage does not exceed your character's maximum attack).
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor % x 6 times
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: One Inch Punch
skills.description: Extend your fist from a close distance to destroy the enemy from the inside. The enemy's SP will be partially consumed and receive continuous damage.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x2
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Energy Blast
skills.description: Gather force then shoot forward. The enemy is pushed away and will receive damage.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per hit
Consumes CaptionRatio3 SP per second
Casting Time: 1 second

skills.name: God Finger Flick
skills.description: Throw a coin by using the tip of your finger to inflict damage on an enemy.
skills.effect_text:
SkillFactor: SkillFactor % x 4
Increase Damage by 20%

skills.name: Golden Bell Shield
skills.description: Briefly increases the damage of all Monk skills.
skills.effect_text:
Monk Skill Damage: + CaptionRatio %
Duration: 10 seconds

attributes.name: Double Punch: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Double Punch] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Palm Strike: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Palm Strike] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Hand Knife: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Hand Knife] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: One Inch Punch: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [One Inch Punch] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

* Increases the skill factor of [Energy Blast] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: God Finger Flick: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [God Finger Flick] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Hand Knife: Armor Break
attributes.description:
* [Hand Knife] attacks ignore the enemy's defense by 4% per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: One Inch Punch: Silence
attributes.description:
* Enemies hit by [One Inch Punch] will be afflicted with [Silence] for 5 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Energy Blast: Remove Knockdown
attributes.description:
* [Energy Blast] no longer knocks enemies down

* Only applies if attribute is set to ON

attributes.name: [Arts] Monk: Nirvana
attributes.description:
* Golden Bell Shield Duration: 30 seconds

* Monk Final Skill Damage +15% additionally during Golden Bell Shield buff

attributes.name: [Arts] Double Punch: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Double Punch] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Palm Strike: Tathagata
attributes.description: * [Palm Strike] skill is changed to positioning skills and the target range doubles. AoE Attack Ratio increases by 10
